drills.name: Mikan Drill
drills.description: Player alternates layups off each side of the backboard using proper footwork. Right side: left foot plants, left hand layup. Left side: right foot plants, right hand layup. Continuous reps without letting the ball hit the floor.

drills.name: Three-Man Weave
drills.description: Three players start at one end. Ball starts with middle player. Player passes to the right, then cuts behind that player. Player receiving continues the weave pattern all the way down the court for a layup. Work both directions.

drills.name: Dribble Drive Attack
drills.description: Player dribbles at a defender from the perimeter. Practice hesitation moves, crossovers, and drive to the basket. Defender plays passive resistance. Rotate offense and defense. Focus on change of pace and change of direction.

drills.name: Shell Drill
drills.description: 4 offensive players spread around the perimeter with 4 defenders. Ball moves via passing only (no dribble). Defenders must rotate correctly to on-ball, one pass away, and two passes away positions. Emphasize denial, ball-you-man positioning, and communication.

drills.name: Elbow Jumpers
drills.description: Player catches at the elbow (high post area) and shoots a mid-range jumper. Partner rebounds and passes to the next player. Work both elbows. Focus on catch-and-shoot technique: feet set, balanced, follow through high.

drills.name: 3-on-2 / 2-on-1 Continuous
drills.description: 3 offensive players attack 2 defenders for a fast break. After the possession ends (score, turnover, or defensive stop), 2 defenders become the offensive players going the other way and 1 new defender releases. Continuous drill. Focus on spacing, passing angles, and defensive communication.

drills.name: Chair Drill
drills.description: Set up chairs or cones as stationary defenders. Player dribbles through the course using designated moves: crossover, between the legs, behind the back, spin. Time each player and compete for fastest completion. Progress to speed dribbling through the course.

drills.name: Catch and Shoot Corners
drills.description: Two lines in corners. Passers at the wing feed corner shooters. Shooter catches, sets feet, and shoots. Alternate corners. Track makes and misses as a team. Progress to coming off screens before catching.

drills.name: Box Out Drill
drills.description: Offense and defense line up facing the basket. Coach shoots and yells 'shot'. Defense must find and box out their player using correct technique: pivot into contact, wide base, arms up. Competition: offense tries to secure rebound, defense tries to clear it out.

drills.name: Motion Offense Walkthroughs
drills.description: 5-on-0 or 5-on-5 execution of the team's motion offense principles. Walk through each action: pass and cut, dribble handoff, screen away, ball screen. Focus on proper spacing (15-18 feet between players), reading the defense, and making the correct decisions.

drills.name: Full Court Dribbling
drills.description: Players dribble full court using designated moves on each trip: right hand only, left hand only, alternating crossovers at half court, speed dribble. Multiple trips without stopping. Can be timed or rep-based. Finish with full speed sprint dribbles.

drills.name: 17s
drills.description: Players sprint sideline to sideline 17 times in under 60 seconds (adjust time based on age/level). Each touch of a sideline counts as 1. Run in groups. Players must complete all 17 touches in the time limit. Rest 45 seconds between sets. Run 3-5 sets total.

drills.name: Pistol Action
drills.description: Guard receives pass at wing, comes off ball screen at the top of the key. Ball handler reads the screen: pop, roll, or reject the screen. Screener reads the defense: roll or pop. Third player spaces in corner. Practice all three actions: pick and roll, pick and pop, rejecting the screen.

drills.name: Ball Pressure Drill
drills.description: Defender applies full ball pressure on the dribbler at the top of the key. Dribbler tries to get to the basket in 5 seconds. Defender must maintain proper stance, active hands, and stay in front. No fouling. Track how many times the offense gets to the basket in 10 reps. Switch roles.

drills.name: Dynamic Warm-Up
drills.description: Full court warm-up sequence: high knees, butt kicks, lateral shuffle, karaoke, A-skips, B-skips, frankensteins, hip circles, arm circles. Two trips each. Follow with 3 sets of 10 jump rope or two-foot hops. Finish with 3 layup lines to get loose at game pace.

drills.name: Spot Shooting
drills.description: Mark 5 spots around the three-point arc (corners, wings, top). Player shoots 2 from each spot for a total of 10 shots. Partner rebounds and passes. Track makes. Compete against teammates. Progress to shooting off the dribble or off a curl. Goal: 7/10 minimum.
